title: THE PROTOCOL
description: A client-side analog horror protocol for Minecraft 1.21.1 where "safety" itself becomes a threat.
body:
THE PROTOCOL turns survival into compliance horror.  
Players begin with an emergency notice and must choose between `SAFE MODE` and `FULL PROTOCOL`.

Core experience pillars:
- Forced shelter pressure through toxic rain and panic systems
- House anchor detection that weaponizes player certainty
- Distorted emergency broadcasts, rule drift, and false all-clear events
- Psychological effects like peripheral sightings, ghost chat, and radio interference
- Optional meta effects in Full Protocol (window behavior, input distortion, system-like panic cues)

Design statement:
"The moment a place is recognized as safe, it becomes visible."

This project is still in beta. It can be unstable.
